drivers and deferred FIXED variants have not been translated

public_notes: BRender is the first production-readiness pilot. A public source checkout matched the recorded v1.3.2 snapshot commit, exposed period make/project metadata, and now has a materializer plus successful out-of-tree CMake configure, FLOAT core-library build, vector math runtime smoke, and BrBegin/BrEnd framework startup smoke through CTest under a Visual Studio Win32 target. The produced brender_core_float.lib and smoke executables remain outside this metadata repo. x64 portability, full V1DB startup, scene rendering, warning cleanup, packaging, drivers, and FIXED variants are not claimed yet.
